name: Moussaka Soup
recipeIngredient: Lamb Stock; Cooked, Cubed - 8 cup (See Recipe 9)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Heat olive oil in a 2-1/2 quart saucepan.
3. Brown the eggplant.
4. Add stock, lamb, salt, and oregano to the saucepan.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes or until eggplant is very soft.
7. Add tomatoes and peas; cook an additional 2 minutes.
8. Serve hot with grated Parmesan cheese garnish.
Each 1 Cup Serving Contains:
Tot Sat
